goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'indian' food and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get phone number and address
